statusLine.command: input=$(cat); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '(.context_window.current_usage.input_tokens // 0) + (.context_window.current_usage.cache_creation_input_tokens // 0) + (.context_window.current_usage.cache_read_input_tokens // 0)'); total=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.context_window_size // 200000'); awk -v u="$used" -v t="$total" 'function f(n){if(n>=1000000)return sprintf("%.1fM",n/1000000);if(n>=1000)return sprintf("%.1fk",n/1000);return "0k"} BEGIN{printf "%s / %s",f(u),f(t)}'; branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$branch" ] && printf " \033[32m%s\033[0m" "$branch"; :
